verification_checks.description: Verify canonical request record hash matches stored hash
verification_checks.details: Recomputed SHA-256 of canonical_request matches record_hashes.request_hash

verification_checks.description: Verify risk evaluation record hash matches stored hash
verification_checks.details: Recomputed SHA-256 of risk_evaluation matches record_hashes.risk_evaluation_hash

verification_checks.description: Verify authorization record hash matches stored hash
verification_checks.details: Recomputed SHA-256 of authorization_record matches record_hashes.authorization_hash

verification_checks.description: Verify execution record hash matches stored hash
verification_checks.details: Recomputed SHA-256 of execution_record matches record_hashes.execution_hash

verification_checks.description: Verify chain_hash is SHA-256 of concatenated record hashes in order
verification_checks.details: SHA-256(request_hash + risk_evaluation_hash + authorization_hash + execution_hash) matches record_hashes.chain_hash

verification_checks.description: Verify authorization record signature against authorizer public key
Verify execution record signature against execution service public key
Verify chronological ordering: requested_at < evaluated_at < authorized_at < executed_at < attested_at
Verify execution occurred within authorization time-bound window

verification_checks.description: Verify authorization nonce has not been used in any prior attestation
verification_checks.details: Nonce nonce-20260324-143342-7f8e9d0c is unique in nonce registry

verification_checks.description: Verify all required policy flags were addressed before execution
verification_checks.details: Two require_authorization flags (pol-fin-001, pol-ai-003) satisfied by authorization b2c3d4e5-f6a7-8901-bcde-f23456789012

notes: System attestation completed automatically after execution. All 11 verification checks passed. The full decision chain — from canonical request through risk evaluation, authorization, and execution — is cryptographically sealed. Record hashes are computed from deterministic JSON serialization (sorted keys, no whitespace). Chain hash provides a single digest for the entire transaction lifecycle.
